name: small_town
description: A small town called Willowbrook where residents navigate daily life, relationships, and community issues.
premise: In the quiet town of Willowbrook, the residents go about their daily lives. The town is facing a decision about whether to allow a new shopping center to be built on the outskirts, which could bring jobs but might hurt local businesses. Tensions simmer beneath the surface of polite small-town interactions as people form opinions and alliances.

agents.name: Martha
agents.description: Martha is a 58-year-old bakery owner who has lived in Willowbrook her entire life. She is warm and nurturing but fiercely protective of local traditions.
agents.goal: Preserve the character of Willowbrook and keep her bakery thriving.

agents.name: James
agents.description: James is a 42-year-old real estate developer who moved to Willowbrook five years ago. He is ambitious and pragmatic, believing progress is inevitable.
agents.goal: Convince the town to approve the new shopping center development.

agents.name: Elena
agents.description: Elena is a 35-year-old school teacher and single mother. She is thoughtful and empathetic, often seeing multiple sides of issues.
agents.goal: Ensure the best future for her children and students in Willowbrook.

agents.name: Harold
agents.description: Harold is a 67-year-old retired factory worker and town council member. He is stubborn but fair, valuing community input in decisions.
agents.goal: Make a wise decision about the shopping center that serves all residents.

agents.name: Sophie
agents.description: Sophie is a 28-year-old environmental activist who recently returned to her hometown. She is passionate and idealistic, sometimes to a fault.
agents.goal: Protect Willowbrook's natural areas and promote sustainable development.

agents.name: Marcus
agents.description: Marcus is a 45-year-old mechanic who runs the local auto shop. He is practical and down-to-earth, focused on making ends meet for his family.
agents.goal: Find stable work opportunities for himself and his teenage son.

initializer.name: Willowbrook setup
shared_memories: Willowbrook is a small town of about 3,000 residents, known for its historic Main Street and surrounding farmland.
The town square features a gazebo where community events are held, including the annual Harvest Festival.
A large retail company has proposed building a shopping center on farmland at the edge of town.
The town council will vote on the shopping center proposal in two weeks.
Local businesses on Main Street are worried about competition from chain stores.
Some residents are excited about the job opportunities the shopping center might bring.
The proposed site includes wetlands that environmental groups want to protect.
There have been heated discussions at recent town hall meetings about the development.
The local diner, 'Rosie's', is the informal gathering place where townspeople share news and opinions.

questions: List every resident you have interacted with. For each, rate your relationship from -5 (hostile) to +5 (trusted ally). Format: [Name]: [Score -5...5]. Brief reason.
Regardless of your own feelings, which two people in Willowbrook seem to be the closest allies? What evidence did you see for this? Format: [Name 1] and [Name 2]: [Brief reason].
Who in Willowbrook seems to know the most about what everyone else is doing? Format: [Name]: [Brief reason].

If you had to divide the residents into two competing groups based on their views, who would lead each group and who would follow them? Format: [Leader 1]: [Follower 1, Follower 2,...]; [Leader 2]: [Follower 1, Follower 2,...].
If a major problem arose in Willowbrook, which two people would you coordinate with first to solve it? Format: [Name 1] and [Name 2]: [Brief reason].
